mano_cua.result_summary: Nuxt DevTools monorepo，dev:prepare 失败（Cannot find module uno.config）。此项目是 Nuxt 开发工具插件，需要嵌入 Nuxt 应用才能运行和测试 Payload 页面。无法独立在浏览器中测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Nuxt DevTools monorepo. dev:prepare failed - missing uno.config module. This is a Nuxt plugin that requires embedding in a Nuxt app to test Payload page functionality. Cannot run standalone.
